languages.text: "Подобно тому как бинт стягивает рану, а заплата скрепляет поврежденную сталь, так и слова могут исцелить расколотый разум. Он озадачен и напуган, не понимает, какой дар ему преподнесли — поговорите с ним".

"Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."
languages.original_text: "Подобно тому как бинт стягивает рану, а заплата скрепляет поврежденную сталь, так и слова могут исцелить расколотый разум. Он озадачен и напуган, не понимает, какой дар ему преподнесли — поговорите с ним".

traits.locale_text: "Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."

"Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."

"Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."

languages.text: 「傷口を包帯で止めるように、鋼の破損を補強するパッチのように、言葉は心の傷を癒すことができる。彼は困惑し、恐怖に怯えている。与えられた贈り物を理解していない。彼に話しかけてみよう」
languages.original_text: "Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."

traits.locale_text: 「傷口を包帯で止めるように、鋼の破損を補強するパッチのように、言葉は心の傷を癒すことができる。彼は困惑し、恐怖に怯えている。与えられた贈り物を理解していない。彼に話しかけてみよう。」

languages.text: “正如绷带包扎伤口，补丁加固钢材，言语也能治愈破碎的心智。他现在既困惑又害怕，尚未理解自己获得的这份恩赐。去和他谈谈吧。”
languages.original_text: "Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."

traits.locale_text: “正如绷带包扎伤口，补丁加固钢材，言语也能治愈破碎的心智。他现在既困惑又害怕，尚未理解自己获得的这份恩赐。去和他谈谈吧。”

languages.text: « Comme un pansement appliqué sur une plaie ou une pièce de métal soudée à une armure endommagée, les paroles peuvent soigner un esprit fracturé. Il est désorienté et effrayé, car il ne comprend pas le don qui lui a été offert. Parlez-lui. »
languages.original_text: "Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."

traits.locale_text: « Comme un pansement appliqué sur une plaie ou une pièce de métal soudée à une armure endommagée, les paroles peuvent soigner un esprit fracturé. Il est désorienté et effrayé, car il ne comprend pas le don qui lui a été offert. Parlez-lui. »

languages.text: «Al igual que un vendaje protege una herida y un parche asegura el acero dañado, las palabras también pueden curar una mente fracturada. Está desorientado y asustado. No entiende el don que ha recibido. Hable con él».
languages.original_text: "Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."

traits.locale_text: «Al igual que un vendaje protege una herida y un parche asegura el acero dañado, las palabras también pueden curar una mente fracturada. Está desorientado y asustado. No entiende el don que ha recibido. Hable con él».

languages.text: "Tıpkı bir sargının bir yarayı sarması ve bir yamanın hasarlı çeliği sabitlemesi gibi sözler de parçalanmış bir zihni iyileştirebilir. Şaşkın ve korkmuş durumda. Kendisine verilen armağanı anlamıyor. Onunla konuşun."
languages.original_text: "Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."

traits.locale_text: "Tıpkı bir sargının bir yarayı sarması ve bir yamanın hasarlı çeliği sabitlemesi gibi sözler de parçalanmış bir zihni iyileştirebilir. Şaşkın ve korkmuş durumda. Kendisine verilen armağanı anlamıyor. Onunla konuşun."

languages.text: "Wie eine Bandage eine Wunde verbindet und eine Schweißnaht beschädigten Stahl stärkt, können Worte einen gebrochenen Geist heilen. Er ist verwirrt und verängstigt. Er versteht das Geschenk nicht, das ihm gewährt wurde ... sprecht mit ihm."
languages.original_text: "Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."
